title: WCD Odisha – Anganwadi Worker – 04 Posts

basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Recruitment 2026 for 04 posts of Anganwadi Worker. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 26-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WCD Odisha official website.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as of 01.01.2023

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 12th pass (10+2 Standard) and knowledge of Odisha language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Women and Child Development Department Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026
